en.extract:
The speckle-faced parrot has been split into the following species:

Plum-crowned parrot, Pionus tumultuosus
White-capped parrot,  Pionus seniloides
en.wikitext:
The '''speckle-faced parrot''' has been split into the following species:
* [[Plum-crowned parrot]], ''Pionus tumultuosus''
* [[White-capped parrot]],  ''Pionus seniloides''
